else:
            raise ValueError("No image found in the chat message!")

    def get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None:
        """Lazily resolve and cache the image's mimetype.

        If the mimetype hasn't been resolved yet, guesses it from the image
        bytes and caches the result on the instance so subsequent calls don't
        repeat the guessing work.
        """
        if self.image_mimetype:
            return self.image_mimetype

        if self.image:
            guess = filetype.guess(base64.b64decode(self.image))
            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None

        return self.image_mimetype

input.command:
python -c "
from llama_index.core.base.llms.types import ImageBlock
import base64, filetype

png_header = bytes.fromhex('89504e470d0a1a0a0000000d49484452')
b = ImageBlock(image=png_header)
print('cached mimetype after init:', b.image_mimetype)
print('get_image_mimetype():', b.get_image_mimetype())

b2 = ImageBlock(image=png_header, image_mimetype='image/custom')
print('explicit mimetype preserved:', b2.get_image_mimetype())

b3 = ImageBlock(path=None)
try:
    b3 = ImageBlock()
    print('no image mimetype:', b3.get_image_mimetype())
except Exception as e:
    print('err', e)
"

content.content:
diff --git a/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py b/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
index 00e30cf23..94e1d1257 100644
--- a/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
+++ b/llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
@@ -108,6 +108,22 @@ class ImageBlock(BaseModel):
         else:
             raise ValueError("No image found in the chat message!")
 
+    def get_image_mimetype(self) -> str | None:
+        """Lazily resolve and cache the image's mimetype.
+
+        If the mimetype hasn't been resolved yet, guesses it from the image
+        bytes and caches the result on the instance so subsequent calls don't
+        repeat the guessing work.
+        """
+        if self.image_mimetype:
+            return self.image_mimetype
+
+        if self.image:
+            guess = filetype.guess(base64.b64decode(self.image))
+            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None
+
+        return self.image_mimetype
+
 
 ContentBlock = Annotated[
     Union[TextBlock, ImageBlock], Field(discriminator="block_type")

+        If the mimetype hasn't been resolved yet, guesses it from the image
+        bytes and caches the result on the instance so subsequent calls don't
+        repeat the guessing work.
+        """
+        if self.image_mimetype:
+            return self.image_mimetype
+
+        if self.image:
+            guess = filetype.guess(base64.b64decode(self.image))
+            self.image_mimetype = guess.mime if guess else None
+
+        return self.image_mimetype
+
 
 ContentBlock = Annotated[
     Union[TextBlock, ImageBlock], Field(discriminator="block_type")

content.text: Coordinated with agent1 (both needed `types.py`, agreed on disjoint regions: I added only the new `get_image_mimetype()` method, they own `image_to_base64`/`normalize_image_bytes`). Implemented and tested `ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype()`: returns cached `image_mimetype` if set, otherwise decodes the base64-stored image and guesses via `filetype.guess`, caching the result. Verified behavior for cached, guessed, and no-image cases. Patch written to `patch.txt`.
